title: ornithogalum soleae
intro: Ornithogalum soleae, also known as Star of Bethlehem, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Ornithogalum soleae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
